title: Better Death Messages
description:
Changes the 'You Died!' screen text and adds some funny but humiliating death messages
p.s. the pack image was created by chatgpt
body:
![BETTER DEATH MESSAGES LOGO](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/945819b124dbab49980f9cf37d9c2753b062d64a.png)

# Update 2.0.0
- Adds new death messages for certain mobs plus tweaked the other ones as well
### Photos
![Player forgot how to land (fell from a high place)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b92e76fc850a3147199535fb4d28084e0fcd38d3_0.webp)
![Player flew straight to a wall (experienced kinetic energy)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1e31c7bdc02f2e1c090a1813f9bc44cc598a7703.png)
![Player fell out of the universe (fell out of the world)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/83d9f55125ecc0941a180c20279868e95ca50244_0.webp)
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cd6bfa84bb96a89cbc7d1b3dd397bc9ebc87cf16_0.webp)

...and much more!

**Download** the pack to see all the other messages!

# Update 1.0.0
 - The original version of Better Death Messages (BDM)
### Photos
